data.label: Employment Record
data.description:
A single employment relationship between a person and an employer.
Business Context: Links Civil Registry persons to Business Registry entities
Purpose: Document an employment position with dates, role, and compensation

items.label: Department
items.description: Department or division within the employer organization

items.label: City
items.description: One of the nine cities in the Republic of Cordova.

items.label: Employment Status (Cordova)
items.description: Employment classification in Cordova employment records.

items.label: Province
items.description: One of the three provinces of the Republic of Cordova. Used across civil registry, property, tax, and all geographic records.

items.label: End Date
items.description:
Date employment ended. Null for current positions.

---

items.label: Compensation
items.description:
Salary and benefits information. Restricted to Tax Authority and Employer/HR roles.
Purpose: Record compensation for tax reporting and labor statistics
Parent Cluster: Employment Record

items.label: Yes/No
items.description: Standard Yes/No binary response for clinical data collection

items.label: Pay Frequency
items.description: How often the employee is paid

items.label: Salary Amount
items.description: Monthly gross salary or wage in Cordova Córdoba. Represents the agreed compensation amount before deductions for taxes, social security, and other withholdings.

subject.label: Employee
subject.description: Person employed by an organization. W3C PROV-DM Agent (Person) with Cordova CID.

provider.label: Employer
provider.description: Organization employing the person. W3C PROV-DM Agent (Organization) with Cordova BRN.
